---
title: 'Goals'
date: '2011-09-17T13:07:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3947283163255991786'
blogger_filename: '/2011/09/goals.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - '2nd Car'
  - 'House'
  - 'Ministry'
  - 'Clothing'
  - 'Book'
---

Goals should be:<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li>Specific</li>
<li>Attainable</li>
<li>Measurable</li>
<li>Meaningful</li>
</ul>
<div>
<br /></div>
